_comment: Cheffy expression poses. Data, not code -- tweak numbers here to change how Cheffy emotes, without touching components. Each pose is a partial override of REST in src/utils/cheffyRig.ts; anything omitted stays at its rest value. Dialogue nodes reference these by name via their 'expression' field.
_params: bob/shiftX (px offsets, -up), tilt (deg), squash (1=none <1 squat >1 stretch), brimDy (px, -21 tucks brim into hat-band position), brimBend (-1 frown..+1 smile; |bend|>0.15 switches to round mouth caps, otherwise the brim is a sharp bar), brimLen (half-length), brimW (stroke width), lookX/lookY (gaze px), eyesDy (structural, -40 hides eyes in hat), lidTopL/R (upper lid drop 0..1), lidBotL/R (lower lid rise 0..1, 0.5=sleepy dome), lidAngleL/R (deg, brow tilt -- mirrored automatically so + angles read as a scowl on both eyes). Eyes NEVER scale or squash -- closed eye = lidTop 0.42 + lidBot 0.42 (bold center band).
_motion: Optional per-pose 'motion': 'soft' | 'default' | 'snappy' picks the spring feel used to enter the pose.

hidden._: Plain hat icon: brim tucked up to become the hat band, eyes inside the hat.

excited._: Big smile + a lift. Eyes stay wide open at their fixed size.

happy._: The squared brim itself curves into the smile (same bar, no caps swap).

sleepy._: Half-domes resting on the brim (eyes drop via eyesDy, never resize).

wink._: Right eye closes to a sliver (occlusion, not squash).

scowl._: Determined. Angled upper lids + slight frown of the brim.

surprised._: Small round mouth + a lift. Eye size never changes.

_aliases: Alternate names dialogue authors may use; both sides must exist.
